findings.title: Hard-coded credential or secret
findings.rationale: A secret-bearing field is assigned a literal value in source.
findings.remediation: Move secrets to an external secret store / parameter; never embed in source.

findings.title: Sensitive data written to log/output
findings.rationale: A DISPLAY statement references a sensitive field, risking exposure in logs/SYSOUT.
findings.remediation: Mask or remove sensitive values before DISPLAY; avoid logging secrets/PII.

findings.title: EVALUATE without WHEN OTHER (missing default case)
findings.evidence: EVALUATE ... END-EVALUATE with no WHEN OTHER branch
findings.rationale: Unhandled values fall through silently, which can mask errors or produce incorrect results.
findings.remediation: Add a WHEN OTHER branch to handle unexpected values explicitly.
